theorem imo_1969_p2 (m n : ℝ) (k : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) (y : ℝ → ℝ) (h₀ : 0 < k)
    (h₁ : ∀ x, y x = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + x) / 2 ^ i) (h₂ : y m = 0)
    (h₃ : y n = 0) : ∃ t : ℤ, m - n = t * Real.pi := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (t : ℤ), m - n = t * Real.pi := by
    use 0
    have h₄ : m - n = 0 := by
      
      have h₅ := h₂
      have h₆ := h₃
      have h₇ : y m = 0 := h₂
      have h₈ : y n = 0 := h₃
      have h₉ : ∀ x, y x = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + x) / 2 ^ i := h₁
      have h₁₀ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / 2 ^ i = 0 := by
        rw [h₉] at h₇
        exact h₇
      have h₁₁ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / 2 ^ i = 0 := by
        rw [h₉] at h₈
        exact h₈
      
      have h₁₂ : False := by
        
        
        have h₁₃ : k ≥ 1 := by linarith
        have h₁₄ : 0 < k := by linarith
        
        
        have h₁₅ : k = 1 := by
          by_contra h
          
          have h₁₆ : k ≥ 2 := by
            omega
          
          have h₁₇ : False := by
            
            
            have h₁₈ := h₁₀
            have h₁₉ := h₁₁
            
            
            simp [Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero, Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_one] at h₁₈ h₁₉
            <;>
            (try norm_num at h₁₈ h₁₉) <;>
            (try linarith) <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₂₀ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + m)
                have h₂₁ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + n)
                have h₂₂ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + m)
                have h₂₃ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + n)
                norm_num at h₁₈ h₁₉ h₂₀ h₂₁ h₂₂ h₂₃ <;>
                (try linarith) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    have h₂₄ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + m)
                    have h₂₅ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + n)
                    have h₂₆ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + m)
                    have h₂₇ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + n)
                    norm_num at h₁₈ h₁₉ h₂₄ h₂₅ h₂₆ h₂₇ <;>
                    (try linarith)
                  })
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₂₀ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + m)
                have h₂₁ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + n)
                have h₂₂ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + m)
                have h₂₃ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + n)
                norm_num at h₁₈ h₁₉ h₂₀ h₂₁ h₂₂ h₂₃ <;>
                (try linarith) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    have h₂₄ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + m)
                    have h₂₅ := Real.cos_le_one (a 0 + n)
                    have h₂₆ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + m)
                    have h₂₇ := Real.cos_le_one (a 1 + n)
                    norm_num at h₁₈ h₁₉ h₂₄ h₂₅ h₂₆ h₂₇ <;>
                    (try linarith)
                  })
              })
            <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero, Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_one]
                <;> norm_num at *
                <;> linarith
              })
          exact h₁₇
        
        have h₁₈ : k = 1 := h₁₅
        have h₁₉ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / 2 ^ i = 0 := h₁₀
        have h₂₀ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / 2 ^ i = 0 := h₁₁
        rw [h₁₈] at h₁₉ h₂₀
        have h₂₁ : Real.cos (a 0 + m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ 0 = 0 := by simpa using h₁₉
        have h₂₂ : Real.cos (a 0 + n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ 0 = 0 := by simpa using h₂₀
        have h₂₃ : Real.cos (a 0 + m) = 0 := by
          norm_num at h₂₁ ⊢
          <;> linarith
        have h₂₄ : Real.cos (a 0 + n) = 0 := by
          norm_num at h₂₂ ⊢
          <;> linarith
        have h₂₅ : a 0 + m = Real.pi / 2 + Real.pi * ↑(⌊(a 0 + m - Real.pi / 2) / Real.pi⌋) := by
          have h₂₅₁ : Real.cos (a 0 + m) = 0 := h₂₃
          have h₂₅₂ : a 0 + m = Real.pi / 2 + Real.pi * ↑(⌊(a 0 + m - Real.pi / 2) / Real.pi⌋) := by
            rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h₂₅₁
            obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := h₂₅₁
            use n
            <;>
            (try ring_nf at hn ⊢) <;>
            (try linarith) <;>
            (try field_simp at hn ⊢) <;>
            (try ring_nf at hn ⊢) <;>
            (try linarith)
          exact h₂₅₂
        have h₂₆ : a 0 + n = Real.pi / 2 + Real.pi * ↑(⌊(a 0 + n - Real.pi / 2) / Real.pi⌋) := by
          have h₂₆₁ : Real.cos (a 0 + n) = 0 := h₂₄
          have h₂₆₂ : a 0 + n = Real.pi / 2 + Real.pi * ↑(⌊(a 0 + n - Real.pi / 2) / Real.pi⌋) := by
            rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h₂₆₁
            obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := h₂₆₁
            use n
            <;>
            (try ring_nf at hn ⊢) <;>

    (h0 : Real.log w / Real.log x = 24) (h1 : Real.log w / Real.log y = 40)
    (h2 : Real.log w / Real.log (x * y * z) = 12) : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by 
  have h3 : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := by
    have h3₁ : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by
      have h3₂ : (x : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.1
      have h3₃ : Real.log (x : ℝ) > 0 := Real.log_pos h3₂
      linarith
    have h3₄ : Real.log w / Real.log x = 24 := h0
    have h3₅ : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := by
      field_simp [h3₁] at h3₄
      linarith
    exact h3₅
  
  have h4 : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := by
    have h4₁ : Real.log y ≠ 0 := by
      have h4₂ : (y : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.2.1
      have h4₃ : Real.log (y : ℝ) > 0 := Real.log_pos h4₂
      linarith
    have h4₄ : Real.log w / Real.log y = 40 := h1
    have h4₅ : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := by
      field_simp [h4₁] at h4₄
      linarith
    exact h4₅
  
  have h5 : Real.log y = (3 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := by
    have h5₁ : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := h3
    have h5₂ : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := h4
    have h5₃ : (24 : ℝ) * Real.log x = 40 * Real.log y := by linarith
    have h5₄ : Real.log y = (3 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := by
      apply mul_left_cancel₀ (show (24 : ℝ) ≠ 0 by norm_num)
      linarith
    exact h5₄
  
  have h6 : Real.log w = 12 * (Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z) := by
    have h6₁ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) = Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) := by
      have h6₂ : (x : ℝ) > 0 := by
        have h6₃ : (1 : ℕ) < x := ht.1
        have h6₄ : (0 : ℝ) < (x : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith)
        linarith
      have h6₅ : (y : ℝ) > 0 := by
        have h6₆ : (1 : ℕ) < y := ht.2.1
        have h6₇ : (0 : ℝ) < (y : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith)
        linarith
      have h6₈ : (z : ℝ) > 0 := by
        have h6₉ : (1 : ℕ) < z := ht.2.2
        have h6₁₀ : (0 : ℝ) < (z : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith)
        linarith
      have h6₁₁ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) = Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) := by
        have h6₁₂ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) = Real.log ((x : ℝ) * (y : ℝ) * (z : ℝ)) := by ring_nf
        rw [h6₁₂]
        have h6₁₃ : Real.log ((x : ℝ) * (y : ℝ) * (z : ℝ)) = Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) := by
          rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, h6₂, h6₅, h6₈]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> linarith
        rw [h6₁₃]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, h6₂, h6₅, h6₈]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> linarith
      exact h6₁₁
    have h6₁₂ : Real.log w / Real.log (x * y * z) = 12 := h2
    have h6₁₃ : Real.log w = 12 * Real.log (x * y * z) := by
      have h6₁₄ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
        have h6₁₅ : (x : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.1
        have h6₁₆ : (y : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.2.1
        have h6₁₇ : (z : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.2.2
        have h6₁₈ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) > 0 := by
          have h6₁₉ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) = Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) := h6₁
          rw [h6₁₉]
          have h6₂₀ : Real.log (x : ℝ) > 0 := Real.log_pos (by exact_mod_cast ht.1)
          have h6₂₁ : Real.log (y : ℝ) > 0 := Real.log_pos (by exact_mod_cast ht.2.1)
          have h6₂₂ : Real.log (z : ℝ) > 0 := Real.log_pos (by exact_mod_cast ht.2.2)
          linarith
        linarith
      field_simp [h6₁₄] at h6₁₂
      linarith
    rw [h6₁₃]
    have h6₁₄ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) = Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) := h6₁
    rw [h6₁₄]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> field_simp [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul]
    <;> linarith
  
  have h7 : Real.log x = Real.log y + Real.log z := by
    have h7₁ : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := h3
    have h7₂ : Real.log w = 12 * (Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z) := h6
    have h7₃ : 24 * Real.log x = 12 * (Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z) := by linarith
    have h7₄ : 2 * Real.log x = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := by linarith
    have h7₅ : Real.log x = Real.log y + Real.log z := by linarith
    exact h7₅
  
  have h8 : Real.log z = (2 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := by
    have h8₁ : Real.log x = Real.log y + Real.log z := h7
    have h8₂ : Real.log y = (3 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := h5
    rw [h8₂] at h8₁

  have h9 : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by
    have h9₁ : Real.log z = (2 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := h8
    have h9₂ : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := h3
    have h9₃ : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by
      rw [h9₂, h9₁]
      have h9₄ : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by
        have h9₅ : (x : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.1
        have h9₆ : Real.log (x : ℝ) > 0 := Real.log_pos h9₅
        linarith
      field_simp [h9₄]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp [h9₄]
      <;> linarith
    exact h9₃
  
  exact h9

    Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) =
      10000! / (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) := by 
  have h_main : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) * (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) = 10000! := by
    have h₁ : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) = ∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1) := by
      
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      rw [Finset.prod_eq_multiset_prod]
      rw [Finset.prod_eq_multiset_prod]
      
      have h₂ : (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)).val = (Finset.range 5000).val.map ⟨fun k => 2 * k + 1, fun a b h => by
        simp_all [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range, Nat.even_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
        <;> omega⟩ := by
        ext k
        simp [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range, Nat.even_iff, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try
          {
            constructor <;>
            intro h <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                use k / 2 <;>
                omega
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₁ := h.1 <;>
                have h₂ := h.2 <;>
                omega
              })
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            use k / 2 <;>
            omega
          })
      rw [h₂]
      simp [Finset.prod_map]
      <;>
      rfl
    rw [h₁]
    
    have h₂ : (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) = 10000! := by
      calc
        (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) = (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! := by ring
        _ = (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! := by rfl
        _ = 10000! := by
          have h₃ : (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! = 10000! := by
            
            calc
              (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! = (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! := by rfl
              _ = 10000! := by
                
                have h₄ : (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! = 10000! := by
                  
                  have h₅ : (∏ k in Finset.range 5000, (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! = 10000! := by
                    
                    rfl
                  exact h₅
                exact h₄
          exact h₃
        _ = 10000! := by rfl
    rw [h₂]
    <;> rfl
  
  have h_div : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) = 10000! / (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) := by
    have h₁ : 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! > 0 := by positivity
    have h₂ : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) * (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) = 10000! := h_main
    have h₃ : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) = 10000! / (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) := by
      have h₄ : 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! ∣ 10000! := by
        
        have h₅ : 2 ^ 5000 * 5000! ∣ 10000! := by
          
          apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
          rfl
        exact h₅
      have h₅ : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) = 10000! / (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) := by
        
        have h₆ : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) * (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) = 10000! := h_main
        have h₇ : Finset.prod (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬Even x) (Finset.range 10000)) (id : ℕ → ℕ) = 10000! / (2 ^ 5000 * 5000!) := by
          apply Eq.symm
          apply Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_right (by positivity)

        exact h₇

  apply h_div

    rw [h7] at h6
    have h8 : (24 * Real.log x) / Real.log y = 40 := by simpa using h6
    have h9 : Real.log y = (3 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x := by
      have h10 : Real.log y ≠ 0 := by
        intro h11
        rw [h11] at h8
        norm_num at h8 <;> nlinarith [Real.log_pos (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) < 2)]
      field_simp at h8 ⊢
      nlinarith [Real.log_pos (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) < 2)]
    exact h9
  
  have h_log_z_eq : Real.log z = (2 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x := by
    have h3 : Real.log (x * y * z) = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := by
      have h4 : Real.log (x * y * z) = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := by
        have h5 : Real.log (x * y * z) = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := by
          rw [Real.log_mul (by
            have h6 : (x : ℝ) > 0 := by
              have h7 : (x : ℕ) > 1 := by linarith
              exact by positivity
            positivity
          ) (by
            have h6 : (y : ℝ) > 0 := by
              have h7 : (y : ℕ) > 1 := by linarith
              exact by positivity

          )]
          <;> simp [Real.log_mul, mul_assoc]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
        exact h5

    have h4 : Real.log w / Real.log (x * y * z) = 12 := h2
    rw [h3] at h4
    have h5 : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := h_log_w_eq
    rw [h5] at h4
    have h6 : (24 * Real.log x) / (Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z) = 12 := by simpa using h4
    have h7 : Real.log y = (3 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x := h_log_y_eq
    rw [h7] at h6
    have h8 : Real.log x > 0 := by
      have h9 : (x : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.1
      exact Real.log_pos h9
    have h9 : Real.log z = (2 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x := by
      have h10 : (24 * Real.log x) / (Real.log x + ((3 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x) + Real.log z) = 12 := by simpa using h6
      have h11 : Real.log x + ((3 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x) + Real.log z ≠ 0 := by
        intro h
        rw [h] at h10
        norm_num at h10
        <;>
        (try norm_num at h10) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try field_simp at h10) <;>
        (try nlinarith)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            nlinarith [Real.log_pos (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) < 2)]
          })
      field_simp at h10
      nlinarith [Real.log_pos (by norm_num : (1 : ℝ) < 2)]
    exact h9
  
  have h_main : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by
    have h3 : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := h_log_w_eq
    have h4 : Real.log z = (2 : ℝ) / 5 * Real.log x := h_log_z_eq
    have h5 : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by
      have h6 : (x : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast ht.1
      have h7 : Real.log x > 0 := Real.log_pos h6

    have h6 : Real.log z ≠ 0 := by

      have h₅ : x % 7 = 0 ∨ x % 7 = 1 ∨ x % 7 = 2 ∨ x % 7 = 3 ∨ x % 7 = 4 ∨ x % 7 = 5 ∨ x % 7 = 6 := by

    <;> linarith
  
  have hy_pos : (y : ℝ) > 1 := by

    <;> linarith
  
  have hz_pos : (z : ℝ) > 1 := by
    norm_cast
    <;> linarith

    exact h
  
  have hlog_y : Real.log y > 0 := by
    have h : Real.log y > 0 := Real.log_pos hy_pos
    exact h
  
  have hlog_z : Real.log z > 0 := by
    have h : Real.log z > 0 := Real.log_pos hz_pos
    exact h

      intro h5
      have h6 : Real.log x = 0 := h5
      have h7 : (x : ℝ) = 1 := by
        rw [← Real.exp_log (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < x), ← Real.exp_log (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < (1 : ℝ))]
        simp [h6]
        <;> norm_num at hx_pos ⊢ <;> nlinarith
      have h8 : (x : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast hx_pos
      linarith
    field_simp at h3 ⊢
    <;> nlinarith
  
  have hlog_w' : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := by
    have h3 : Real.log w / Real.log y = 40 := h1
    have h4 : Real.log y ≠ 0 := by
      intro h5
      have h6 : Real.log y = 0 := h5
      have h7 : (y : ℝ) = 1 := by

        simp [h6]
        <;> norm_num at hy_pos ⊢ <;> nlinarith
      have h8 : (y : ℝ) > 1 := by exact_mod_cast hy_pos
      linarith
    field_simp at h3 ⊢

    have h4 : Real.log (x * y) = Real.log x + Real.log y := by

      <;> ring
    rw [h3, h4]
    <;> ring
  
  have hlog_denom : Real.log (x * y * z) = (Real.log w)/24 + (Real.log w)/40 + Real.log z := by

    have h4 : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := by rw [hlog_w]
    have h5 : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := by rw [hlog_w']
    have h6 : Real.log x = (Real.log w) / 24 := by
      have h7 : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by linarith
      field_simp [h7] at h4 ⊢

    have h7 : Real.log y = (Real.log w) / 40 := by

    have h8 : Real.log (x * y * z) = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := by rw [hlog_xz]
    have h9 : Real.log (x * y * z) = (Real.log w)/24 + (Real.log w)/40 + Real.log z := by

      <;> ring

      <;> nlinarith

  have hlog_z_val : Real.log z = (Real.log w)/60 := by
    have h3 : Real.log w / Real.log (x * y * z) = 12 := h2
    have h4 : Real.log (x * y * z) = (Real.log w)/24 + (Real.log w)/40 + Real.log z := hlog_denom

          have h10 : (w : ℝ) > 0 := by
            by_contra h11
            have h12 : (w : ℝ) ≤ 0 := by linarith
            have h13 : Real.log (w : ℝ) ≤ 0 := Real.log_nonpos (by positivity) (by linarith)
            linarith
          have h14 : Real.log (w : ℝ) = 0 := by simpa using h9
          have h15 : (w : ℝ) = 1 := by
            apply Real.log_injOn_pos (Set.mem_Ioi.mpr (by positivity)) (Set.mem_Ioi.mpr (by positivity))
            simp_all [Real.log_one]

        have h16 : w = 1 := by

        (try simp_all [div_eq_mul_inv]) <;>
        (try field_simp [hlog_x.ne', hlog_y.ne', hlog_z.ne'] at * <;> nlinarith)
      field_simp [h5]

theorem imo_1969_p2 (m n : ℝ) (k : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) (y : ℝ → ℝ) (h₀ : 0 < k)
    (h₁ : ∀ x, y x = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + x) / 2 ^ i) (h₂ : y m = 0)
    (h₃ : y n = 0) : ∃ t : ℤ, m - n = t * Real.pi := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (t : ℤ), m - n = t * Real.pi := by
    
    
    
    refine' ⟨0, _⟩
    
    
    have h₄ : m - n = 0 := by
      
      
      have h₅ := h₂
      have h₆ := h₃
      have h₇ : y m = 0 := h₂
      have h₈ : y n = 0 := h₃
      have h₉ : y m = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by
        rw [h₁]
        <;> simp [h₀]
      have h₁₀ : y n = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by
        rw [h₁]
        <;> simp [h₀]
      rw [h₉] at h₇
      rw [h₁₀] at h₈
      
      
      
      norm_num at h₇ h₈ ⊢
      <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₇ h₈ ⊢) <;>
      (try simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero, Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_sub]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₇ h₈ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith [Real.pi_pos]) <;>
      (try field_simp at h₇ h₈ ⊢) <;>
      (try ring_nf at h₇ h₈ ⊢) <;>
      (try norm_num at h₇ h₈ ⊢) <;>
      (try linarith [Real.pi_pos])
      <;>
      (try
        {
          cases k with
          | zero => contradiction
          | succ k' =>
            simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero, Nat.cast_zero, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_sub]
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            norm_num at *
            <;>
            linarith [Real.pi_pos]
        })
    
    linarith
  exact h_main

theorem aime_1983_p1 (x y z w : ℕ) (ht : 1 < x ∧ 1 < y ∧ 1 < z) (hw : 0 ≤ w)

    (h2 : Real.log w / Real.log (x * y * z) = 12) : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by

    norm_cast
    <;> linarith
  
  have hy : (y : ℝ) > 1 := by

    <;> linarith

      rw [h₄]
      simp [h₅.ne']
    rw [h₆] at h0
    norm_num at h0
    <;> linarith
  
  have h_log_x : Real.log x > 0 := by
    have h₁ : Real.log x > 0 := Real.log_pos (by
      norm_cast <;> linarith)
    exact h₁
  
  have h_log_y : Real.log y > 0 := by
    have h₁ : Real.log y > 0 := Real.log_pos (by
      norm_cast <;> linarith)
    exact h₁
  
  have h_log_z : Real.log z > 0 := by
    have h₁ : Real.log z > 0 := Real.log_pos (by
      norm_cast <;> linarith)
    exact h₁
  
  have h_log_w : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := by
    have h₃ : Real.log w / Real.log x = 24 := h0
    have h₄ : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := by
      have h₅ : Real.log x ≠ 0 := by linarith
      field_simp at h₃ ⊢
      <;> ring_nf at h₃ ⊢ <;> nlinarith
    exact h₄
  
  have h_log_w' : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := by
    have h₃ : Real.log w / Real.log y = 40 := h1
    have h₄ : Real.log w = 40 * Real.log y := by
      have h₅ : Real.log y ≠ 0 := by linarith

          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try nlinarith)
          ) (by
          
          norm_cast
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try nlinarith)
          )]
      rw [h₇]
      have h₈ : Real.log (x * y : ℝ) = Real.log x + Real.log y := by
        rw [Real.log_mul (by
          
          norm_cast
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try nlinarith)
          ) (by
          
          norm_cast
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try nlinarith)
          )]
      rw [h₈]
      <;> ring
    rw [h₄]
    <;> ring
  
  have h_log_w'' : Real.log w = 12 * (Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z) := by
    have h₃ : Real.log w / Real.log (x * y * z) = 12 := h2
    have h₄ : Real.log w = 12 * (Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z) := by
      have h₅ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) = Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z := h_log_xyz
      have h₆ : Real.log (x * y * z : ℝ) > 0 := by

    have h₆ : Real.log x + Real.log y + Real.log z = 2 * Real.log x := by linarith
    have h₇ : Real.log y + Real.log z = Real.log x := by linarith
    have h₈ : Real.log x = Real.log y + Real.log z := by linarith

  have h_log_z_rel : Real.log z = (2 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := by
    have h₃ : Real.log x = Real.log y + Real.log z := h_log_rel_2
    have h₄ : 3 * Real.log x = 5 * Real.log y := h_log_rel_1
    have h₅ : Real.log y = (3 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := by
      linarith
    have h₆ : Real.log z = (2 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := by
      rw [h₅] at h₃
      ring_nf at h₃ ⊢
      linarith
    exact h₆
  
  have h_log_w_final : Real.log w = 60 * Real.log z := by
    have h₃ : Real.log w = 24 * Real.log x := h_log_w
    have h₄ : Real.log z = (2 / 5 : ℝ) * Real.log x := h_log_z_rel
    have h₅ : Real.log w = 60 * Real.log z := by
      rw [h₃, h₄]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> nlinarith
    exact h₅
  
  have h_final : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by
    have h₃ : Real.log w = 60 * Real.log z := h_log_w_final
    have h₄ : Real.log z > 0 := h_log_z
    have h₅ : Real.log w / Real.log z = 60 := by
      rw [h₃]
      field_simp [h₄.ne']
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp [h₄.ne']
      <;> nlinarith
    exact h₅
  
  exact h_final

  have h5 : Real.log (w : ℝ) = 12 * Real.log ((x : ℝ) * y * z) := by

    have h₆ : Real.log (w : ℝ) = 12 * Real.log ((x : ℝ) * y * z) := by

    <;> ring

    <;> ring
    <;> linarith
  
  have h9 : Real.log (z : ℝ) = (2/5 : ℝ) * Real.log (x : ℝ) := by
    have h9 : Real.log ((x : ℝ) * y * z) = Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) := h8

    have h13 : Real.log (x : ℝ) + Real.log (y : ℝ) + Real.log (z : ℝ) = 2 * Real.log (x : ℝ) := by linarith

  have h10 : Real.log (w : ℝ) / Real.log (z : ℝ) = 60 := by
    have h10 : Real.log (w : ℝ) = 24 * Real.log (x : ℝ) := h3
    have h11 : Real.log (z : ℝ) = (2/5 : ℝ) * Real.log (x : ℝ) := h9

theorem imo_1969_p2 (m n : ℝ) (k : ℕ) (a : ℕ → ℝ) (y : ℝ → ℝ) (h₀ : 0 < k)
    (h₁ : ∀ x, y x = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + x) / 2 ^ i) (h₂ : y m = 0)
    (h₃ : y n = 0) : ∃ t : ℤ, m - n = t * Real.pi := by 
  have h₄ : ∃ (t : ℤ), m - n = t * Real.pi := by
    have h₅ : y m = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> simp [h₀]
    have h₆ : y n = ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> simp [h₀]
    rw [h₅] at h₂
    rw [h₆] at h₃
    have h₇ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i = 0 := by linarith
    have h₈ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i = 0 := by linarith
    
    have h₉ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.cos (a i) : ℝ) / 2 ^ i = ∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.cos (a i) : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
    have h₁₀ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.sin (a i) : ℝ) / 2 ^ i = ∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.sin (a i) : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
    
    have h₁₁ : ∃ (t : ℤ), m - n = t * Real.pi := by
      
      by_cases h : (∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.cos (a i) : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i) = 0 ∧ (∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.sin (a i) : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i) = 0
      · 
        use 0
        have h₁₂ : m - n = 0 * Real.pi := by
          have h₁₃ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i = 0 := by linarith
          have h₁₄ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i = 0 := by linarith
          have h₁₅ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i = ∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.cos (a i) * Real.cos m - Real.sin (a i) * Real.sin m) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
            intro i _
            have h₁₆ : Real.cos (a i + m) = Real.cos (a i) * Real.cos m - Real.sin (a i) * Real.sin m := by
              rw [Real.cos_add]
            rw [h₁₆]
            <;> ring
          have h₁₆ : ∑ i in Finset.range k, Real.cos (a i + n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i = ∑ i in Finset.range k, (Real.cos (a i) * Real.cos n - Real.sin (a i) * Real.sin n) / (2 : ℝ) ^ i := by
            apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
            intro i _
            have h₁₇ : Real.cos (a i + n) = Real.cos (a i) * Real.cos n - Real.sin (a i) * Real.sin n := by
              rw [Real.cos_add]
